allow: PowerShell(npm run build > build.log 2>&1; "exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; Get-Content build.log | Select-String "error" | Select-Object -First 5; Remove-Item build.log)
PowerShell(npm run build > build.log 2>&1; "exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; Get-Content build.log | Select-String "error|Error" | Select-Object -First 6; Remove-Item build.log)

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime, @{N="CmdLine";E={\(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(120, \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine.Length\)\)}})
PowerShell(Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next; npm run build > build.log 2>&1; "exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; Get-Content build.log | Select-String "error" | Select-Object -First 4; Remove-Item build.log)
